description_long: This object is a long, single-edged sword with a gently curved blade, reminiscent of a katana or similar traditional sword. The blade is slender, tapering to a fine point, and appears to be made of polished metal, giving it a sleek and reflective surface. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and slightly longer than typical knife handles, likely designed for a two-handed grip, and is visually distinct from the blade with a darker coloration. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, resulting in a streamlined silhouette. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible ornamentation or decorative elements on either the blade or handle. The object is well-proportioned and appears to be crafted for both functionality and aesthetic simplicity.
description: A long, curved, single-edged sword with a polished metal blade and a straight, dark handle, lacking ornamentation or a guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade and straight handle, highlighting the sword's elegant profile.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the curvature and proportions of the blade and handle seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again emphasizing the slimness of the blade and the handle's straight form.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, dark-colored, smooth, likely wood
